page_content:
Formerly: EDPS899.

TLTC - Teaching and Learning Transformation Center

TLTC499 Independent Study in Teaching and Learning (1-3 Credits) Earn academic credit for the time spent supporting TLTC’s educational development programs and/or engaging in the scholarship of teaching and learning.

Restriction: Permission of TLTC required - enrollment restriction. Repeatable to: 6 credits.

TLTC699 Special Topics in University Teaching and Learning (1-3 Credits) Special topics seminars for graduate students interested in university teaching and learning.
